name: Tribble's Banquet
recipeIngredient: Chicken Breast or other part (per sandwich)
Sliced Swiss cheese (1 oz per sandwich)
Sliced Corn Beef (1 oz per sandwich)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook and chill the chicken ahead of time.
2. Make the coleslaw by mixing shredded cabbage, carrots, and green onions in a large bowl. Add mayonnaise, lemon juice, and seasoned salt, then mix well.
3. To make the sandwiches: Place a slice of Swiss cheese and a slice of corned beef on a slice of rye bread. Remove meat from bones of 1 chicken piece and spread over the corned beef. Sprinkle with seasoned salt, add coleslaw (2-3 tablespoons), and top with a second slice of bread.
4. Cut each sandwich in half and serve with a pickle.
